name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 30 Sep 2024
body: [{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW:","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we have launched a new segment category in our Next Generation Segment Builder that enables you to fetch contacts from relational tables."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Kindly read ahead to know more!!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"NEW FEATURE:","bold":true}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"New Rule Category in the Next Generation Segment Builder","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"A new category - "},{"text":"Relational Data","bold":true},{"text":" - has been introduced in our Next Generation Segment Builder"},{"text":". ","bold":true},{"text":"This enables you to segment and retrieve contacts from relational tables and SQL queries."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"New to Relational Tables? Relational tables offer quick and powerful ways to extend personalization data beyond the standard 1:1 relationship of a contact field. For example, managing various pets and their associated demographics in a household. To start learning about relational tables and SQL queries in Marketing Cloud, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Introduction-to-Relational-Tables","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Introduction to Relational Tables","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"When using the "},{"text":"Relational Data","bold":true},{"text":" category, you can choose from the following rules:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Relational Tables","bold":true},{"text":": To create rules based on the data from your relational tables. "}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"SQL Queries","bold":true},{"text":": To create rules based on the data from your SQL queries."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Note","bold":true},{"text":": The new category is also supported on our AI builder. So, you can use the ‘Build With AI’ functionality and create the segment simply by writing a sentence."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about segment rules, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Segment-Rules-in-Next-Gen-Segment-Builder","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Segment Rule (Next-Generation)","bold":true}]},{"text":". Also, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Creating-Segments-with-Next-Gen-Segment-Builder","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Creating Segments with Next-Gen Segment Builder","bold":true}]},{"text":" to understand the basic guidelines for creating a segment."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The following shows a screenshot of the Relational Data category on the Next Generation Segment Builder page:"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/segmentRuleRelationalData.068J1000004egnzIAA.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/segmentRuleRelationalData.068J1000004egnzIAA.png","name":"segmentRule-RelationalData","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1587,"width":2560}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]
